explanation: Omission: The command line omits the suspicious parameters that trigger the Sigma rule by not including the specific command-line arguments that match the Sigma pattern.
Insertion: An extra dummy parameter is inserted into the command line, which may prevent the Sigma rule from matching due to the altered structure of the command-line arguments.
Substitution: A benign file path is added to the command line, which may alter the command-line structure and prevent the Sigma rule from matching due to the presence of a non-sensitive file path.
